message:
chore(beads): record reality-check HIGH findings and resample progress

Flush JSONL after today's reality-check-for-project sweep and the
active groupby-resample oracle work so .beads/issues.jsonl mirrors
the SQLite store.

Status transitions:
- frankenpandas-icm3 (DataFrameGroupBy.resample first|last live
  pandas oracle) → open → closed. Shipped 3eebb3b with two new fp-
  frame tests (sparse groups + three-groups negative values) taking
  the groupby_resample_first_last suite to 5/5.
- frankenpandas-i2j8 (DataFrameGroupBy.resample sum|mean live oracle)
  → open → in_progress.

New reality-check issues filed against README claims vs observed
code state:

- frankenpandas-0yz7 (P1, bug): README says MultiIndex Yes-foundation
  but row MultiIndex is absent. br-r4au's flat-string workaround was
  reverted in br-ch4o; DataFrame::index returns Index<IndexLabel>
  not MultiIndex<Vec<IndexLabel>>, groupby([k1,k2]).sum still emits
  string-flattened keys (FP-P2C-005 / FP-P2C-011), and .loc[(a,1)]
  tuple-keying plus real stack/unstack/reset_index on MultiIndex
  frames is not behaviorally complete.

- frankenpandas-diic (P1, bug): No fp-python crate present (ls crates
  shows 12 crates, none of them fp-python/fp-pyo3). The README
  drop-in-pandas claim is unbacked until PyO3 bindings ship.

- frankenpandas-ho6t (P1, bug): proptest
  prop_excel_round_trip_preserves_shape fails —
  fp_io::write_excel_bytes default index=true emits the row index as
  a leading column and fp_io::read_excel_bytes default does not
  strip it, so the public default round-trip leaks an extra column.
  Same root cause as br-989b / br-mxho; escalates LOW br-arnn to HIGH.

- frankenpandas-m3e8 (P2, bug): README IO table claims SQL parity
  maps to fp_io::read_sql / write_sql but the impl hardcodes
  rusqlite::Connection with no SqlConnection trait abstraction, no
  PostgreSQL/MySQL backends, no chunksize streaming, and coerce_float
  absent. Either file the SQL backend-abstraction epic or revise the
  README IO row to "SQLite-only via rusqlite".

- frankenpandas-zgqj (P2, bug): fp-conformance bootstrap_cases at
  1212 passed / 37 failed with 8 cascading top-level aggregates
  (ci_gate_g6, ci_pipeline, e2e_suite, differential_*,
  packet_suite_is_green_for_bootstrap_cases, failure_forensics,
  grouped_reports, differential_all_packets_green) still red 24h
  after the lib-update sweep concluded. Captures the per-fixture
  burndown needed before the README "1249 fixtures / 430 packets,
  all green" claim holds again.

No code changes; JSONL only.
